timeline.details: Alfa Predict — an agent platform with a suite of MLOps and LLM tools. AIDA — an AI platform for document recognition and validation.

PT NGFW — the firewall management system. Worked closely on scenarios with the PM, analyst and frontend engineer. Reworked the navigation; designed IPsec connections, ICAP, BGP/OSPF profiles, AS-path and various log views. Created and rolled out a supporting design system: a Figma library, Confluence specs and help with React component adoption — product time to market dropped by 24% on average.
AmTIP (a knowledge base with a relationship graph) and IM (a security incident management system). Migrated both products to the Submarine design system.

Ampire cyber range — a training system that emulates hacker attacks. Built the Submarine design system, redesigned the product on top of it, moved everything to tokens and components, designed the new RedTeam mode.
Designed a mobile app for collecting contacts at trade shows and a CRM system. Built a presentation prototype for entering the European market and created an interactive expo map editor from scratch.
Designed websites and mobile apps for the studio's clients.
Business cards, banners, retouching, large-format printing, print-ready layouts.
